description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Node.js CI Unix Platform that runs on push and pull request events. Use a job matrix to test across multiple Node.js versions (18.x, 20.x, 22.x), operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest), compilers (clang, gcc), and API versions (standard, experimental). For each job, harden the runner, check out the code, set up Python 3.11 and Node.js according to the matrix parameters, install dependencies with npm, and run npm test with custom environment variables and compiler flags.
